name: tradingview
description: TradingView data access with persistent Chrome profile. K-line history, technical indicators, quotes, options chains, screener, news, watchlists, alerts, chart state, and screenshots.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only TradingView market data and chart automation
interface.longDescription: Access TradingView data through a persistent Chrome profile: multi-timeframe K-line history, local technical indicators, spot quotes, options chains, screeners, news, watchlists, alerts, chart state, and screenshots.
defaultPrompt: Get the latest quote for NASDAQ:AAPL.
Screen oversold US stocks using RSI.
Analyze the options chain for TSLA.
